---
title: "Causal Discovery"
author: "Hansen Zhang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")
if (!require("graph", quietly = TRUE))
    BiocManager::install("graph")
if (!require("RBGL", quietly = TRUE))
    BiocManager::install("RBGL")
if (!require("Rgraphviz", quietly = TRUE))
    BiocManager::install("Rgraphviz")
if (!require("dplyr", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("dplyr")
if (!require("DiagrammeR", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("DiagrammeR")
if (!require("pcalg", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("pcalg")
if (!require("rsvg", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("rsvg")

library(dplyr)
library(DiagrammeR)
library(graph)
library(RBGL)
library(Rgraphviz)
library(pcalg)
library(rsvg)
```

__!!! Important !!!__
To get this code to run correctly you need the following file structure. Code in a folder and data in a folder on the  same level. Do not change the name of the data folder. You can use any name for the code folder. The code expects files to be referenced from the code folder.

# Data

```{r}
# ── 1. Run Import Data ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

sampSize <- 250000 # sample size of this run

data_complete <- read.csv("../566 Project Data/crashes2012to24.csv") # raw prossessed Data
data_complete <- data_complete %>% 
  select(-X, -ST_CASE, -VEH_NO, -PER_NO, -CrashVehicle, -M_HARM, -YEAR) # drop unused/peffect outcome cor cols
data_complete <- data_complete %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.double), ~ round(.x, 0))) # round since imputing leaves some tinny decimals
data_complete <- data_complete[sample(nrow(data_complete), sampSize), ] # sample from data
data_complete <- as.data.frame(lapply(data_complete, as.factor))  # all data as factors
data_int <- as.data.frame(lapply(data_complete, as.integer)) # integer only data
```

```{r}
# ── 2. Check Number of Cats ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

nlev <- sapply(data_int, function(x) length(unique(x)))
sort(nlev, decreasing = TRUE)
prod(nlev)
```

```{r}
# ── 2. DF to RFCI Format ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
dm       <- data.matrix(data_int) - 1L # data matrix of integers shifted to 0
nlev     <- sapply(data_complete, nlevels) # number of levels raw
suffStat <- list(dm = dm, nlev = nlev, adaptDF = FALSE) # final data set up
```

# RFCI

```{r}
# ── 4. Run RFCI ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
set.seed(42)
rfci_fit <- rfci(
  suffStat   = suffStat,
  indepTest  = disCItest,
  labels     = colnames(data_int),
  alpha      = 0.05,
  verbose    = TRUE,
  m.max      = 3L,                  # integer, not double
  skel.method = "stable.fast",      # required for numCores to work
  numCores   = 1L
)
```
```{r}
saveRDS(rfci_fit, file = "rfci_fit_250k_2012_24.rds")
```

```{r}
# ── 5. Orientation Enforcement ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

tiers <- c(
  AGE=1, DR_AGE=1, DR_SEX=1,
  DAY_WEEK=2, ROUTE=2, RUR_URB=2, RELJCT1=2,
  LGT_COND=2, WEATHER=2, VPAVETYP=2, VSURCOND=2, MECISSUE=2,
  DR_DRINK=3, PREV_ACC=3, P_CRASH1=3,
  VE_FORMS=4, M_HARM=4, VIS=4,
  PED_DEATH=5
)

vars <- colnames(data_complete)
amat <- rfci_fit@amat

for (i in seq_along(vars)) {
  for (j in seq_along(vars)) {
    if (i == j) next
    # Edge exists and lower tier -> higher tier: enforce i -> j
    if (amat[i, j] != 0 && tiers[vars[i]] < tiers[vars[j]]) {
      amat[i, j] <- 2   # arrowhead at j
      amat[j, i] <- 3   # tail at i
    }
  }
}
```

# Visualizations
## Simple

```{r}
# ── 6. Plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Plot without enforcement
plot(rfci_fit)   # original PAG before tier enforcement
```
```{r}
# Plot with enforcement
rfci_enforced <- rfci_fit
rfci_enforced@amat <- amat
plot(rfci_enforced)
```

# Nice

Nice DAGS
```{r}
# You can run this to grab the model so you don't have to rerun the whole file.
# RDStoVis <- "rfci_fit_100k_2012_24.rds"
RDStoVis <- "rfci_fit_250k_2012_24.rds"

visModel <- readRDS(RDStoVis) # Read in saved RDS file
```

```{r}
# ── Plotting Function ────────────────────────────────────────────────

amat_to_dot <- function(amat) {
  n <- nrow(amat)
  nms <- rownames(amat)
  lines <- c("digraph PAG {", 
             "  rankdir=LR;",
             '  node [shape=ellipse, style=filled, fillcolor="#AED6F1"];')
  
  mark_str <- function(m) switch(as.character(m), "1"="odot", "2"="normal", "3"="none", "none")
  
  for (i in 1:(n-1)) {
    for (j in (i+1):n) {
      if (amat[i,j] != 0 || amat[j,i] != 0) {
        arrow_tail <- mark_str(amat[j,i])  # mark at i's side
        arrow_head <- mark_str(amat[i,j])  # mark at j's side
        lines <- c(lines, sprintf(
          '  %s -> %s [dir=both, arrowtail="%s", arrowhead="%s"];',
          nms[i], nms[j], arrow_tail, arrow_head
        ))
      }
    }
  }
  paste(c(lines, "}"), collapse="\n")
}



```

```{r}
# ── Plot ans Save Non-Enforced ────────────────────────────────────────────────

plotType <- "not_enforced"
PAGLoc <- paste0("plot_", plotType, "_", gsub("^rfci_fit_|\\.rds$", "", RDStoVis))

dot_code <- amat_to_dot(visModel@amat)
grViz(dot_code)

svg_out <- DiagrammeRsvg::export_svg(grViz(dot_code))
writeLines(svg_out, paste0(PAGLoc, ".svg")) # vector, infinitely scalable

# For a 300dpi PNG:
rsvg::rsvg_png(paste0(PAGLoc, ".svg"), paste0(PAGLoc, ".png"),
               width = 3000, height = 2000)
```

```{r}
# ── Orientation Enforcement (for import) ────────────────────────────────────────────────

tiers <- c(
  AGE=1, DR_AGE=1, DR_SEX=1,
  DAY_WEEK=2, ROUTE=2, RUR_URB=2, RELJCT1=2,
  LGT_COND=2, WEATHER=2, VPAVETYP=2, VSURCOND=2, MECISSUE=2,
  DR_DRINK=3, PREV_ACC=3, P_CRASH1=3,
  VE_FORMS=4, M_HARM=4, VIS=4,
  PED_DEATH=5
)

vars <- colnames(visModel@amat)
amat <- visModel@amat

for (i in seq_along(vars)) {
  for (j in seq_along(vars)) {
    if (i == j) next
    # Edge exists and lower tier -> higher tier: enforce i -> j
    if (amat[i, j] != 0 && tiers[vars[i]] < tiers[vars[j]]) {
      amat[i, j] <- 2   # arrowhead at j
      amat[j, i] <- 3   # tail at i
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
# ── Plot ans Save Enforced ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

plotType <- "enforced"
PAGLoc <- paste0("plot_", plotType, "_", gsub("^rfci_fit_|\\.rds$", "", RDStoVis))

dot_code_tier <- amat_to_dot(amat)
grViz(dot_code)

svg_out <- DiagrammeRsvg::export_svg(grViz(dot_code_tier))
writeLines(svg_out, paste0(PAGLoc, ".svg")) # vector, infinitely scalable

# For a 300dpi PNG:
rsvg::rsvg_png(paste0(PAGLoc, ".svg"), paste0(PAGLoc, ".png"),
               width = 3000, height = 2000)
```
